mapper.select: select * from fp_topology where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_topology where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and topology_code = #{topologyCode}
select * from fp_topology where order by updated_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from fp_topology where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_topology (id, tenant_id, topology_code, topology_name, env_id, description, canvas_config_json, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{topologyCode}, #{topologyName}, #{envId}, #{description}, #{canvasConfigJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_topology where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
